function[T0: Field] { T0.0 != T0.1 }[F]
function[T0: Field](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 or T0.0 = x0 }[F](a)
function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[F](a, a.inverse)
function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not Unit.constraint[T0](x0, x1) or exists(k0: Unit[T0]) { Option.some[Unit[T0]](k0) = Unit.new[T0](x0, x1) } }[F](a, a.inverse)
function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (T0.1 = x0 * x1 and T0.1 = x1 * x0) = Unit.constraint[T0](x0, x1) }[F](a, a.inverse)
function[T0: Monoid](x0: Unit[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { Option.some[Unit[T0]](x0) != Unit.new[T0](x1, x2) or x0.val = x1 }[F](u, a, a.inverse)
function[T0: Monoid](x0: Unit[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { Option.some[Unit[T0]](x0) != Unit.new[T0](x1, x2) or x0.inv = x2 }[F](u, a, a.inverse)

goal: exists(k0: Unit[F]) { k0 = u and k0.val = a and k0.inv = a.inverse }

proof: let w0: Unit[F] satisfy { exists(k0: Unit[F]) { k0 = w0 and k0.val = a and a.inverse = k0.inv } }
let w1: Unit[F] satisfy { w1 = w0 and w1.val = a and a.inverse = w1.inv }
let w2: Unit[F] satisfy { w2 = w0 and w2.val = a and a.inverse = w2.inv }
function(x0: Unit[F]) { not (x0.val = a and a.inverse = x0.inv) }(w2)
